blocks.text: Managing executive pay TORM intends to focus on the relationship between executive pay and the wider workforce in the period ahead and develop further the disclosure on this topic. Outside appointments The Executive Director is entitled to retain the fees earned from non-executive appointments outside the Company. Jacob Meldgaard was appointed as a Non- Executive Director of Danish Ship Finance A/S for which he received DKK 350,000 and as a Non- Executive Director of SYFOGLOMAD Limited for which he received Euro 5,000 for his services during 2019.
CHANGE IN CHIEF EXECUTIVE OFFICER'S REMUNERATION COMPARED TO GROUP EMPLOYEES WORLDWIDE

¹ ⁾ The comparative figures used to determine the % change take into consideration the CEO's salary and benefits. ² ⁾ Other benefits provided directly relate to company car benefit. ³ ⁾ % Change in DKK for Salary and Directors Fees is 6%, Taxable Benefits is 0% and Annual Bonus is 175%. The table above shows the average percentage year-on-year change in base salary, benefits and annual bonus in 2018 for the Chief Executive Officer compared to the entire Group’s employees.
